scripts.predev: node -e "const { execSync } = require('node:child_process'); try { execSync('gcloud --version', { stdio: 'ignore' }); execSync('gcloud auth application-default print-access-token', { stdio: 'ignore' }); } catch (err) { console.error('ADC not available. Run: gcloud auth application-default login'); process.exit(1); }"
